22. (97 * 19) + (59 * 41 * 7) - 13 = 1843 + (2419 * 7) - 13 = 1843 + 16933 - 13 = 18776
23. (97 * 23.46) + ...

Let's Try:  **(97 * 59) - (17 * 13) + (41 * 19 * 7) = 5723 - 221 + (779 * 7) = 5502 + 5453 = 10955** Nope.
